Identity.Name: StingIssuePriorities
Identity.Definition: Issue priority levels. Drives SLA tracking, escalation, and mobile inbox sort order. Critical / High priorities trigger immediate push notifications; Low / Informational are batched into the daily digest.

Governance.StandardsBasis: STING BimIssue.Priority; Planscape SLA tracking conventions

Value.Definition: Critical — programme-blocking or safety-critical. SLA: 4 hours. Push immediately.
High — significant impact, needs same-day attention. SLA: 24 hours. Push immediately.
Medium — standard priority. SLA: 72 hours. Daily digest.
Low — minor / nice-to-resolve. SLA: 7 days. Weekly digest.
Informational — for awareness only, no required action. No SLA.
